regulation_name: Act on Fair Labeling and Advertising
citation: Act on Fair Labeling and Advertising — Article 3
summary: Performance and efficacy claims must be truthful and supported by adequate evidence under fair labeling rules.
review_guidance: TRIGGER: Performance statistics, guaranteed results, or efficacy percentages. ACTION: WARN — require substantiation or qualify claim. CHECK: Test method, KS standard, and typical results. ESCALATE IF: Absolute or unsubstantiated performance claim.
